data.title: POET wins Product Innovation Award at ICCSZ Awards; Dr. Mo Jinyu wins Technology Innovation Award. Presented in Dongguan City, China.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, POET Technologies Inc. was announced as the winner of the Product Innovation Award at the 12th Infostone Communication Consultant Shenzhen (ICCSZ) Awards. The company, trading on NASDAQ under the symbol POET, specializes in designing and implementing highly-integrated optical engines and light sources for artificial intelligence networks. Dr. Mo Jinyu, POET's Senior Vice President of Global Product Development, was also recognized with the Technology Innovation Award in the Individual/Team category. The awards ceremony took place during the IFOC 2025 Infostone Optical Communication Annual Forum & 2025 Awards Ceremony in Dongguan City, China.

data.title: PMC Energy Limited acquires Metro and Active to expand commercial HVAC platform in Halifax. Acquisition completed in January 20, 2026.
data.description: PMC Energy Limited, a well-established company serving commercial and institutional clients in Atlantic Canada, has broadened its presence in the Halifax Regional Municipality (HRM) through the purchase of Metro and Active. The acquisitions were finalized on January 20, 2026. PMC Energy Limited, commonly referred to as PMC, now owns these two entities, marking a significant expansion of their operations in the region.

data.title: SpryPoint gets growth investment from Insight Partners to expand its utility platform. January 20, 2026(PRNewswire).
data.description: SpryPoint, a leading provider of a cloud-native utility platform for customer service and operations, revealed on Jan. 20, 2026, that they secured a significant capital investment to fuel their expansion and bolster their standing in the market. The investment aims to accelerate their growth and solidify their position as a market leader in the industry. The exact amount of the investment was not disclosed in the news.

data.title: FiberX appoints Dr. Indranil Ghosh, a strategic investment leader and MIT-trained chemical engineer, to the board of directors.
data.description: A seasoned entrepreneur with years of experience in growing climate tech and advanced materials businesses has joined Tiger Hill Capital as the founder. This news comes from Merrillville, Indiana, on January 20, 2026. The company in question, FiberX, specializes in agricultural technology and is focused on converting post-harvest corn stover into high-performance industrial products. This strategic move brings significant expertise to Tiger Hill Capital, poised to accelerate the growth and development of FiberX.

data.title: Dr. Nicole Caillier introduces scalable operating platform for healthcare staffing, aiming at durable growth market expansion.
data.description: Experienced professional Dr. Nicole Caillier launches a flexible operational system for companies venturing into or broadening their presence in healthcare staffing. The initiative was unveiled in Lafayette, Louisiana, on January 20, 2026. This development comes as artificial intelligence and automation are significantly transforming various sectors worldwide.

data.title: New Brunswick, NJ expands water treatment plant with Penetron for durability, meeting regulations; completion set for June 2025.
data.description: In June 2025, the municipal membrane water treatment plant in New Brunswick, New Jersey (USA) is set to finish its rehabilitation and expansion project. This initiative is crucial for the city to comply with stricter environmental standards for drinking water. The use of PENETRON ADMIX SB, a crystalline concrete waterproofing solution, will enhance the plant's infrastructure and ensure its longevity. The updated facility will be better equipped to handle the growing demand for clean water while maintaining compliance with regulations.

data.title: Dirty Secret Gaming Studio secures licensing rights for Fortnite game experiences to mark America250, the country's 250th year anniversary.
data.description: An interactive development studio based in Venice, California has recently obtained the exclusive license to commemorate America's 250th anniversary within the popular video game Fortnite. The studio, named Dirty Secret Gaming Studio, is known for creating original content and innovative gaming experiences. This acquisition was announced on January 19, 2026, and is set to be a significant partnership within the gaming industry.

data.title: Bitcoin at $91,255; Ethereum down 3% as treasury yields rise; $361.56M liquidated, $394.7M outflows in Bitcoin ETFs.
data.description: Bitcoin has decreased by 2% in the last 24 hours, impacted by rising U.S. Treasury yields affecting risk assets. Liquidations have amounted to $361.56 million during this period. Bitcoin ETFs experienced $394.7 million in net outflows on Friday, while Ethereum ETFs recorded $4.64 million in net inflows. The meme coin market capitalization has seen a 3.9% decline, reaching $44.7 billion. Current cryptocurrency ticker prices include Bitcoin at $91,255.16, Ethereum at $3,105.82, Solana at $128.84, XRP at $1.93, Dogecoin at $0.1256.

data.title: Riverview Landscapes acquires Meticulous, Inc., marking 20th acquisition since 2022, enhancing landscape services in Ocean County, NJ.
data.description: In Ocean County, NJ, Riverview Landscapes, a prominent provider of professional landscape services, has recently acquired Meticulous Landscaping Inc. This acquisition is significant as it marks Riverview's 20th acquisition since the year 2022. Meticulous Landscaping Inc., founded by Bob and Linda Kraft, is a highly respected landscaping company known for delivering top-notch landscape maintenance services to HOA's in the region. By incorporating Meticulous into its operations, Riverview has further fortified its market position in the landscaping industry.

data.title: Entegris will announce Q4 2025 results on Feb 10, 2026. Conference call scheduled at 8AM ET. Dial +1 833-316-1983 or +1 785-838-9310, Conference ID: ENTGQ425.
data.description: Entegris, Inc., a company listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol ENTG, will be announcing its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call with company management is set for the same day at 8:00 am Eastern Time. To participate, individuals can call either +1 833-316-1983 or +1 785-838-9310 using the Conference ID: ENTGQ425. It is recommended to dial in 5 to 10 minutes before the call begins. Additionally, a live webcast of the call will be available, along with a replay option.

data.title: Ericsson teams with Realbotix for a humanoid robot at Imagine Studio in Plano, Texas for workforce engagement. (120)
data.description: In Las Vegas, Realbotix Corp. disclosed that Ericsson is implementing an advanced humanoid robot embedded with Realbotix’s vision technology for enhancing workforce and visitor interactions. The initiative involves deploying robots at Ericsson’s Imagine Studio experience center in Plano, Texas. Realbotix's technology will be utilized for enhancing workforce training, stakeholder engagement, and interactive experiences at the facility. Realbotix Corp.’s stock is listed as TSX-V: XBOT, Frankfurt: 76M0.F, and OTC: XBOTF.

data.title: NUBURU acquires Lyocon, entering $20B industrial market with blue-laser platform. Acquisition via wholly owned subsidiary.
data.description: Nuburu, Inc. (NYSE American: BURU) based in Denver, has successfully acquired Lyocon S.r.l., an Italian company specializing in laser manufacturing and systems-integration. This strategic move solidifies Nuburu's position in the high-performance blue laser technology sector. The acquisition was completed through Nuburu Subsidiary Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Nuburu, facilitating the acquisition of Lyocon's established operations, customers, and recurring revenues. This marks a significant development in Nuburu's core business model.

data.title: Silvercorp Metals Inc. acquires a 70% interest in Tulkubash/Kyzyltash Gold Projects in Kyrgyzstan, signed Agreements with Chaarat Gold Holdings Limited and National Investment Agency. (Characters: 163)
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 20, 2026, Silvercorp Metals Inc. (TSX: SVM) announced the signing of a Share Purchase Agreement with Chaarat Gold Holdings Limited and a Cooperation Agreement with the National Investment Agency. This agreement is a significant milestone for Silvercorp, showcasing their commitment to strategic partnerships. The details of the agreements were not disclosed, but it indicates a positive development for Silvercorp as they continue to expand their business portfolio. Shareholders are optimistic about the future prospects of the Company following this announcement.
